TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Morocan Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Morocan a niyaro', 161 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 389 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 66% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 256 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 34% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 133 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 58%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 5%, roma 2%. Morocan hanaay a niyaro i itira i Kalingko ,katimol no Kalingko o Kohkoh ko mikowanay,o saka fafaw no Siw Ko rawsi a fadangaw,pasa'amis han i noya niyaniyaroan no ngayngay ato no Pangcah,o Pa'ilasen han no miyam.ya Pa'ilasen a niyaro' tolo ko saniyaro' nira,o Cikidian Lacihakan ato
S.PHON: mo~uro~uʦan itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u mo~uro~uʦan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. mo~uro~uʦan ħanaaj a nijaro~u i itira i kaɾiŋko~u ,katimo~uɾ no~u kaɾiŋko~u o~u ko~uħko~uħ ko~u miko~uwanaj,o~u saka fafaw no~u siw ko~u rawsi a faɬ~ɮaŋaw,pasaʡamis ħan i no~uja nijanijaro~uan no~u ŋajŋaj ato~u no~u paŋʦaħ,o~u paʡiɾasən ħan no~u mijam.ja paʡiɾasən a nijaro~uʡ to~uɾo~u ko~u sanijaro~uʡ nira,o~u ʦikiɬ~ɮian ɾaʦiħakan ato~u
S.FORM: Morocan Itiniay i Ruisui Cen no Hualien ko Morocan a niyaro', 161 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 389 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 66% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 256 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 34% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 133 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 58%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 5%, roma 2%. Morocan hanaay a niyaro i itira i Kalingko ,katimol no Kalingko o Kohkoh ko mikowanay,o saka fafaw no Siw Ko rawsi a fadangaw,pasa'amis han i noya niyaniyaroan no ngayngay ato no Pangcah,o Pa'ilasen han no miyam.ya Pa'ilasen a niyaro' tolo ko saniyaro' nira,o Cikidian Lacihakan ato
S.PHON: mo~uro~uʦan itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u mo~uro~uʦan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. mo~uro~uʦan ħanaaj a nijaro~u i itira i kaɾiŋko~u ,katimo~uɾ no~u kaɾiŋko~u o~u ko~uħko~uħ ko~u miko~uwanaj,o~u saka fafaw no~u siw ko~u rawsi a faɬ~ɮaŋaw,pasaʡamis ħan i no~uja nijanijaro~uan no~u ŋajŋaj ato~u no~u paŋʦaħ,o~u paʡiɾasən ħan no~u mijam.ja paʡiɾasən a nijaro~uʡ to~uɾo~u ko~u sanijaro~uʡ nira,o~u ʦikiɬ~ɮian ɾaʦiħakan ato~u
